summary: Completed testing of two fixes for PITCH'D screenplay analysis tool. Both fixes verified working correctly: Fix 1 (PDF auto-download) and Fix 2 (Bebas Neue font for title cards).
test_credentials: None required - no authentication in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both fixes verified working. Fix 1: PDF export uses jsPDF + html2canvas (CDN loaded) instead of window.print(). Downloads trigger correctly with filename pattern PITCHD_*_OneSheet.pdf. Promo modal with PITCHD25 code appears after download. Export Again button also triggers PDF download. Fix 2: Title cards in 'Title — pick one' section use Bebas Neue font (verified via computed styles showing font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif).

fix_1_pdf_export.lock_and_export_button: PASS - Triggers PDF download, not print dialog
fix_1_pdf_export.promo_modal_after_export: PASS - Modal appears with PITCHD25 code
fix_1_pdf_export.export_again_button: PASS - Triggers PDF download in locked state
fix_1_pdf_export.html2canvas_jspdf_loading: PASS - CDN scripts load and execute correctly

fix_2_bebas_neue_font.title_cards_font_family: PASS - Computed style shows 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif
fix_2_bebas_neue_font.font_loaded_from_google_fonts: PASS - Bebas Neue loaded in index.html
fix_2_bebas_neue_font.visual_verification: PASS - Title cards display in condensed all-caps Bebas Neue style

core_functionality.ai_analysis: PASS - GPT-4o returns results in ~10-20 seconds
core_functionality.results_display: PASS - Titles, loglines, taglines, synopsis all display correctly
